en: My son, keep my wordsand treasure up my commandments with you;
zh: 我兒，要遵守我的話， 把我的誡命珍藏在心裡；

en: keep my commandments and live; keep my teaching as the apple of your eye;
zh: 遵守我的誡命，你就可以存活； 遵守我的訓誨，好像護衛你眼中的瞳人。

en: bind them on your fingers; write them on the tablet of your heart.
zh: 要把它們繫在你的指頭上， 刻在你的心版上。

en: Say to wisdom, "You are my sister," and call insight your intimate friend,
zh: 要對智慧說：“你是我的姊妹”， 要稱呼聰明為親人；

en: to keep you from the forbidden woman, from the adulteress with her smooth words.
zh: 這樣行就可以保護你脫離淫亂的婦人， 脫離說諂媚話的妓女。

en: For at the window of my house I have looked out through my lattice,
zh: 我在我家的窗戶內， 透過窗櫺往外觀看，

en: and I have seen among the simple, I have perceived among the youths, a young man lacking sense,
zh: 看見在愚蒙人中間， 在少年人 裡面， 我發覺有一個無知的少年人，

en: passing along the street near her corner, taking the road to her house
zh: 在街上經過，走近淫婦的住處， 向著她的家走去，

en: in the twilight, in the evening, at the time of night and darkness.
zh: 那時是黃昏、傍晚， 是在夜裡，天黑的時候。

en: And behold, the woman meets him, dressed as a prostitute, wily of heart.
zh: 看哪！有一個婦人來迎接他， 是妓女的打扮，心存詭詐。

en: She is loud and wayward; her feet do not stay at home;
zh: 這婦人喧嘩不停，不受約束； 她在家裡停不住腳。

en: now in the street, now in the market, and at every corner she lies in wait.
zh: 她有時在街上，有時在廣場上， 或在任何角落旁邊藏伏。

en: She seizes him and kisses him, and with bold face she says to him,
zh: 她緊拉著那少年人，和他親嘴， 厚顏無恥地對他說：

en: "I had to offer sacrifices, and today I have paid my vows;
zh: “我曾許願要獻平安祭， 今天我剛還了我所許的願。

en: so now I have come out to meet you, to seek you eagerly, and I have found you.
zh: 因此，我出來迎接你， 切切尋找你，終於找到你。

en: I have spread my couch with coverings, colored linens from Egyptian linen;
zh: 我已用毯子，埃及線織成的花紋布， 鋪了我的床；

en: I have perfumed my bed with myrrh, aloes, and cinnamon.
zh: 又用沒藥、沉香和桂皮， 薰了我的榻。

en: Come, let us take our fill of love till morning; let us delight ourselves with love.
zh: 來吧！我們來飽享愛情，直到天亮， 我們來在愛中盡情享樂。

en: For my husband is not at home; he has gone on a long journey;
zh: 因為我丈夫不在家， 遠行去了。

en: he took a bag of money with him; at full moon he will come home."
zh: 他手裡帶著錢袋， 要到月圓的時候才回家。”

en: With much seductive speech she persuades him; with her smooth talk she compels him.
zh: 淫婦用許多花言巧語引誘他， 用諂媚的嘴唇勾引他。

en: All at once he follows her, as an ox goes to the slaughter, or as a stag is caught fast
zh: 少年人就立刻跟隨她， 好像牛走向屠房， 又像愚妄人帶著鎖鍊去受刑罰，

en: till an arrow pierces its liver; as a bird rushes into a snare; he does not know that it will cost him his life.
zh: 直到箭矢射透他的肝； 他仿佛飛鳥投入網羅， 並不知道會喪失性命。

en: And now, O sons, listen to me, and be attentive to the words of my mouth.
zh: 孩子們，現在你們要聽從我， 留心聽我口中的話。

en: Let not your heart turn aside to her ways; do not stray into her paths,
zh: 你的心不可偏向淫婦的道路， 也不要迷戀她的路徑。

en: for many a victim has she laid low, and all her slain are a mighty throng.
zh: 因為她使許多人倒斃， 被她殺害的實在無數。

en: Her house is the way to Sheol, going down to the chambers of death.
zh: 她的家是通往陰間的路， 是下到死亡的宮房。
